# Baoheng Plastic

> Baoheng Plastic is a manufacturer of injection- and blow-molded plastic pallets, pallet boxes, crates, bulk containers, and waste bins for warehousing, logistics, cold-chain, food, sanitation, and industrial applications.

Use the pages below to identify a suitable product family, compare operating requirements, review sourcing guidance, or send a quotation request. Product suitability and load ratings should be confirmed against the buyer's actual load, equipment, storage, temperature, hygiene, and transport conditions.

## Main pages

- [Product Center](https://www.baohengplastic.com/products/): Browse all plastic handling product families.
- [Industry Applications](https://www.baohengplastic.com/industries/): Start with a warehouse or handling environment.
- [Manufacturing](https://www.baohengplastic.com/manufacturing/): Review production capabilities and quality controls.
- [Product Selection Support](https://www.baohengplastic.com/selection-support/): Prepare operating conditions for a product recommendation.
- [Request a Quote](https://www.baohengplastic.com/contact/): Send dimensions, quantity, load, and application requirements.
- [About Baoheng Plastic](https://www.baohengplastic.com/about/): Company and manufacturing background.

## Product families

- [Plastic Pallets](https://www.baohengplastic.com/products/pallets/): Nestable, rackable, stackable, blow-molded, food-grade, spill-control, and specialty pallets.
- [Pallet Boxes and Bulk Containers](https://www.baohengplastic.com/products/pallet-boxes-bulk-containers/): Foldable pallet boxes and large reusable containers.
- [Plastic Crates and Boxes](https://www.baohengplastic.com/products/crates-boxes-totes/): Folding crates, turnover boxes, tanks, and freezing or drying trays.
- [Plastic Waste Bins](https://www.baohengplastic.com/products/waste-bins/): Bins for municipal, facility, and industrial sanitation projects.

## Buying resources

- [Insights](https://www.baohengplastic.com/resources/insights/): Practical guides for specifying, testing, operating, and maintaining plastic load carriers.
- [RFQ Specification Checklist](https://www.baohengplastic.com/resources/insights/2605-plastic-pallet-rfq-specification-checklist/): Information to collect before requesting a quotation.

## Language versions

- [简体中文](https://www.baohengplastic.com/zh/)
- [Español](https://www.baohengplastic.com/es/)
- [Français](https://www.baohengplastic.com/fr/)
